query: UPDATE menu_addon_groups SET name = 'Peça seu molho favorito!', minSelections = 1, maxSelections = 2 WHERE menuItemId IN (150024, 150025, 150026, 150027) AND (name LIKE '%Molho%' OR name LIKE '%molho%'); SELECT g.id, g.menuItemId, g.name FROM menu_addon_groups g WHERE g.menuItemId IN (150024, 150025, 150026, 150027) ORDER BY g.menuItemId;
